recommendations.title: Museo
recommendations.overview: Mexico, 1985. Juan and Wilson, two perennial Veterinary students, perpetrate an audacious heist in the National Museum of Anthropology, running away with a loot of more than hundred invaluable pieces of Mayan art, unaware of the consequences of their

recommendations.title: Casa de Mi Padre
recommendations.overview: Scheming of a way to save their father's ranch, the Alvarez brothers find themselves in a war with Mexico's most feared drug lord.

recommendations.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
recommendations.overview: A guarded woman finds out she's dying of cancer but, when she meets her match, the threat of falling in love is scarier than death.

recommendations.title: Ferry 2
recommendations.overview: After losing his drug empire, Ferry Bouman has found a measure of peace away from Brabant's criminal underworld — until his past catches up to him.

recommendations.title: Mammoth
recommendations.overview: When Leo travels to Thailand on business, he unwittingly sets off a chain of events that will have dramatic consequences for everyone.

recommendations.title: Carlito's Way
recommendations.overview: Free after years in prison, Carlito Brigante intends to give up his criminal ways, but it's not long before the ex-con is sucked back into the New York City underworld.

recommendations.title: The Mother
recommendations.overview: A deadly female assassin comes out of hiding to protect the daughter that she gave up years before, while on the run from dangerous men.

recommendations.title: Letters to Juliet

recommendations.title: Batman Begins

recommendations.title: Repo Men
